goal: Install TanStack Table + Virtual and rebuild the Ledger page with virtual scrolling and expandable rows

tasks.name: Install @tanstack/react-table and @tanstack/react-virtual
tasks.action: npm install @tanstack/react-table @tanstack/react-virtual. Verify versions land in package.json and lock file updates.

tasks.name: Rewrite Ledger.tsx with TanStack Table, virtual scrolling, and expandable rows
tasks.action: Rewrite Ledger.tsx: (1) Define TanStack column defs for: Ref, Date, Type, Description, Total Debit, Total Credit. (2) Use useReactTable with manualPagination, manualFiltering, getCoreRowModel, getExpandedRowModel. (3) Each row represents a JournalEntryResponse. Expanding a row reveals its journalLines as sub-rows (account, debit, credit). (4) Use useVirtualizer from @tanstack/react-virtual on the tbody container with a fixed row height estimate (~40px). (5) Table container: fixed height calc(100vh - 220px), overflow-y: auto. (6) Sticky thead via position: sticky, top: 0. (7) Infinite scroll: when virtualizer scrolls near bottom, trigger loadEntries({ append: true }) to fetch next page. (8) Update types/ledger.ts if needed for any new response fields. (9) Keep the page header, error feedback, and basic structure. Remove the old filter-bar, flat-line logic, and manual Load More button.

tasks.name: Update Ledger.css for virtual scroll container, sticky header, expandable rows
tasks.action: Add CSS: (1) .ledger-scroll-container with fixed height, overflow-y auto, border. (2) .ledger-table thead with position sticky, top 0, z-index 10, background paper. (3) .ledger-row--expandable cursor pointer, hover highlight. (4) .ledger-subrow with indented left padding, lighter background for journal line detail rows. (5) Remove old filter-bar-related selectors that are no longer used. Keep .journal-totals, .journal-ref, .journal-desc styles.

commitMessage: feat(ledger-ui): rebuild ledger with TanStack Table, virtual scroll, expandable rows
